Title: Valid login with standard_user
Steps: 1. Enter username 'standard_user'; 2. Enter password 'secret_sauce'; 3. Click Login
Expected: User is redirected to the inventory page and 'Products' title is shown

Title: Login with locked_out_user
Preconditions: User is on the login page
Steps: 1. Enter username 'locked_out_user'; 2. Enter password 'secret_sauce'; 3. Click Login
Actual: this user has been locked out.' is displayed and login is blocked

Title: Login with invalid password
Preconditions: User is on the login page
Steps: 1. Enter username 'standard_user'; 2. Enter password 'wrong_password'; 3. Click Login
Expected: Error 'Username and password do not match any user in this service' is displayed

Title: Login with unknown username
Preconditions: User is on the login page
Steps: 1. Enter username 'ghost_user'; 2. Enter password 'secret_sauce'; 3. Click Login
Expected: Error 'Username and password do not match any user in this service' is displayed

Title: Login with empty username
Preconditions: User is on the login page
Steps: 1. Leave username empty; 2. Enter password 'secret_sauce'; 3. Click Login

Title: Login with empty password
Preconditions: User is on the login page
Steps: 1. Enter username 'standard_user'; 2. Leave password empty; 3. Click Login

Title: Logout returns user to login page
Preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user
Steps: 1. Open the hamburger menu; 2. Click Logout
Expected: User is logged out and the login form is displayed

Title: All six products are listed
Preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user
Expected: Exactly 6 products are displayed with name

Title: Sort products price low to high
Preconditions: User is on the inventory page
Steps: 1. Select 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
Expected: Products are reordered ascending by price

Title: Sort products price high to low
Preconditions: User is on the inventory page
Steps: 1. Select 'Price (high to low)' from the sort dropdown
Expected: Products are reordered descending by price

Title: Add single item updates cart badge
Preconditions: User is on the inventory page
Steps: 1. Click 'Add to cart' on Sauce Labs Backpack

Title: Add multiple items appear in cart
Preconditions: User is on the inventory page
Steps: 1. Add Sauce Labs Backpack; 2. Add Sauce Labs Bike Light; 3. Open the cart
Expected: Cart shows 2 items matching the products added

Title: Remove item decrements badge
Steps: 1. Click 'Remove' on one product from inventory

Title: Continue shopping returns to inventory
Preconditions: User is on the cart page
Expected: User is returned to the inventory page

Title: Complete checkout with valid info
Preconditions: User has at least 1 item in cart
Steps: 1. Open cart; 2. Click Checkout; 3. Enter first name, last name and postal code; 4. Click Continue; 5. Click Finish
Expected: Order confirmation 'Thank you for your order!' is displayed

Title: Checkout blocked without first name
Preconditions: User clicked Checkout with item in cart
Steps: 1. Leave first name empty; 2. Enter last name and postal code; 3. Click Continue
Expected: Error 'Error: First Name is required' is displayed

Title: Checkout blocked without postal code
Preconditions: User clicked Checkout with item in cart
Steps: 1. Enter first and last name; 2. Leave postal code empty; 3. Click Continue
Expected: Error 'Error: Postal Code is required' is displayed

Title: Full purchase journey
Steps: 1. Login as standard_user; 2. Add 2 products; 3. Open cart and verify items; 4. Checkout and fill info; 5. Continue and review totals; 6. Finish order
Expected: Order is placed successfully and confirmation page is shown

Title: Cart persists across navigation
Steps: 1. Add a product; 2. Navigate to product detail and back; 3. Open cart
Expected: Added product still present in the cart
